km.France: ប្រទេសបារាំង

zh.lifeSummary: Oosterzele Earl of Chester於大約0980年出生在法國。他至少有1個女兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Oosterzele Earl of Chester于大约0980年出生在法国。他至少有1个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: Earl
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English e(o)rl ‘earl’, a traditional English title of nobility equivalent in rank to French and Norman Count .

variants.name: Harle
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Dieter, Johann, Kurt.
South German (Härle): nickname from a diminutive of Middle High German hār ‘hair’.

English (northern) and Scottish: habitational name from Kirkharle and Little Harle in Northumberland (earlier simply Herle, Harle), possibly named from an Old English personal name Herela (a derivative of various compound names with the first element here ‘army’) + Old English lēah ‘wood, clearing’.

variants.name: Earls
meanings: English: variant of Earl with genitival -s, denoting someone who was a member of an earl's household, or, with post-medieval excrescent -s. In Ireland, when this is not the English name, it is from Gaelic Mac an Iarla ‘son of the earl’.

variants.name: Hearl
meanings: English: variant of Earl with prosthetic H-.

variants.name: Count
meanings: English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French counte ‘count’ (Old French conte, from Latin comes, comitem); a title of French and Norman nobility, ranking as equivalent to English Earl .

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Kyong, Kyong Suk, Young, Chae, Chi Young, Hang, Kil, Rin, Sang Hun, Chang, Chong, Insoo, Kum, Sun Young, Yom, Young Hwan.  Cambodian Kiwan, Oeurn, Phoeun, Pich, Saroeuth, Seung, Sophath, Sophea, Yoeun, Phan, Son.  Indian Shanti, Harendra.
Indian (Uttar Pradesh): Brahmin name, from Sanskrit om, the Hindu sacred and mystic syllable uttered at the beginning of prayers.
Cambodian: written ឱម, corresponding to the exclamation of solemn affirmation, of Sanskrit origin (see 1 above), chanted by Buddhist monks.

variants.name: Oum
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Southeast Asian Heang, Hye, Kam, Kan, Kheng, Khin, Kun, Sang, Sok, Phong, Yom, Yoo, Youn, Cuong, Phal, Samnang, Tin.  Cambodian Sokha, Chheang, Choeun, Moeun, Roeun, Sambath, Samoeun, Savuth, Soeun, Sopheap.
Cambodian: written អ៊ុំ, from a Khmer word denoting an elder sibling of one's parent (i.e. ‘uncle’ or ‘aunt’). Compare   Om   3 and   Um   2.

nameMeanings.name: Chester
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Chester, the county seat of Cheshire, or from any of various smaller places called with this word (as for example Little Chester in Derbyshire, Chester le Street in County Durham, or Chesters in Northumberland), which is from Old English ceaster ‘Roman fort or walled city’ (from Latin castra ‘legionary camp’).

variants.name: Cheshire
meanings: English: habitational name for someone from the county of Cheshire in northwestern England, the name of which is early recorded as Cestrescire, from the name of the county seat, Chester , + Old English scīr ‘district, division’.

variants.name: Chesterman
meanings: English: possibly a topographic name for someone who lived by a Roman fort, Old English ceaster, or a habitational name for someone from any of the places mentioned at Chester .

en.lifeSummary: Oosterzele Earl of Chester was born about 0980, in France. He had at least 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Oosterzele Earl of Chester est né environ 0980, à France. Il a eu au moins 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Oosterzele Earl of Chester wurde um 0980 in Frankreich geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Oosterzele Earl of Chester è nato il circa 0980 nel Francia. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: Oosterzele Earl of Chesterは約0980年にフランスで生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Oosterzele Earl of Chester(은)는 대략 0980년 프랑스에서 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Oosterzele Earl of Chester nasceu aproximadamente 0980, em França. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Oosterzele Earl of Chester родился около 0980 г. в местности Франция. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Oosterzele Earl of Chester nació aproximadamente 0980, en Francia. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija.
